title: Pan Seared Mexican Mung Bean Sprouts Tacos Al Pastor
description: A lazy Sunday Mexican dish featuring mung bean sprouts, this recipe is a twist on traditional tacos al pastor with a Buddhist temple friendly twist, using mung bean sprouts instead of meat. It is a charred and bouncy dish perfect for a relaxing day.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium high heat.
Add the sliced onion and cook until it is translucent and starting to caramelize.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute until fragrant.
Add the mung bean sprouts and cook until they are tender and lightly browned.
Add the diced pineapple and cook for 2 minutes until the pineapple is tender.
In a small bowl, whisk together the orange juice and lime juice.
Pour the juice mixture over the mung bean sprouts and pineapple, and stir to combine.
Warm the tortillas by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
Assemble the tacos by spooning the mung bean sprout mixture onto a tortilla and topping with chopped cilantro.
